name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
[](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fpdjkl-yddjllujiu-r/) Merry Christmas, friend! **🎄 🎁**

This year, I am particularly grateful for steadfast supporters like you, who never lose sight of what truly matters as we continue to strive for a more perfect Union.The American people made their voices heard and have entrusted Republicans with a majority in Congress. Thanks to your continued support, we will get straight to work to get America back on track in the new year.As we reflect on our blessings this Christmas season, I hope you will join me in prayerful gratitude for living in the greatest nation on earth.**Glory to God in
the highest, and on
earth peace, good
will toward men.
_\- Luke 2:14_** From my family to yours, I wish you a wonderful and safe Christmas!Sincerely,
Glenn Grothman [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fpdjkl-yddjllujiu-y/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress

name: American Briefing
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4s18e95ghm2g3c83ehio1o8oi9h7cokjp9s0p98_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb729q038bmqj5sg2f06ms23e71ut7j20p9qi3po_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c1h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp7tdda5u6d5v6hkrean1lseeb0rl9grdrgpujlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c1h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
Big Democrat names are now calling her nomination "illegitimate"
Friend, this is urgent:
We emailed you just a few days ago requesting your support to stand with Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett... **but not enough Patriots stepped up to help.**
This is serious: the Liberal Mob is rushing to collect hundreds of thousands of signatures to remove our beloved Conservative Supreme Court justice and REPLACE her with a Liberal activist appointed by Joe Biden! But it gets even worse: _Big Democrat names are now calling her nomination "illegitimate" laying the groundwork for EXPELLING her!_
[**We 'll only ask you once more: Sign on to STAND WITH AMY CONEY BARRETT before the Liberal Mob formally moves to expel her!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z68lp4njm27ldqee0ccro1mkjahvm7dc179o1lrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)
******[STAND WITH AMY CONEY BARRETT >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zagljd8g33ffge498a7gh8qchnurqpqpo2t6bo9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)**
_Trust us, the Liberal Mob isn 't wasting a second. They're gaining lots -- possibly thousands -- of new supporters every single day. _
[**Respond right now and help us save Amy Coney Barrett before it 's too late. **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z18vhi8od8cq1ps588emo0mnmrmj76jjm34p7lj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)
Thank you,
Breaking Supreme Court Update
Sent via Team Scalise
_To see our original communication to you about this crisis, read the following message:_
__
__________________________________________________
__
**Forwarded Message: Amy Coney Barrett forced off the Supreme Court bench??**
****
_**INTERCEPTED:** The Far-Left's petition to impeach beloved Conservative Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett! _
_[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7g4k5vvti035uvtaf2d0odfgbsmk9r8sbt9hjlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)_
Far-Left Democrats have almost reached their goal -- we have to move NOW. [**We need 20,000 Patriots to go on the record and STAND WITH Amy Coney Barrett RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW >> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlncoim1gl6d3off9gsmu42tuic2eke48iovgqag_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)

__
This story is developing in real time. Democrats were FURIOUS when Republicans appointed Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. They knew she would stand up for our Pro-Life values, 2nd Amendment Rights, and religious freedoms.
__
_Now, Democrats are trying any desperate attempt to force Amy Coney Barrett off the court and replace her with a Far-Left Radical!_
__
[**We need the full force of our grassroots network to make their nationwide petition backfire. We 're calling on at least 20,000 Patriots to go on the record by midnight tonight to stand with Amy Coney Barrett, a Republican-nominated Supreme Court Justice.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgdjop9ieo7e7ojj8ndllsuihvjk64mur9h3lpoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)
__
If Democrats take control of the Supreme Court, they'll destroy our Conservative legacy in the blink of an eye.
__
_We can 't let them get away with sidelining one of our best Supreme Court Justices. _
__
[**Stand with Amy Coney Barrett today by adding your e-signature to our petition before the Radical Left impeaches her. **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zucjm30d5tejq6f824avtgao6d6k76qcv9nmf5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2cjh2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuu77s1t1e2jkn2rs4nk9ka5g3s8saucnmnj5vfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbo4b3tv1fdhm8q3p7lk84r0riig59junvgelhgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c5h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjljuh6bff1mj7opslp0t6q1vv0f53nf8q3ivbio_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c5h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zva07j1sm4ac4vb37btelmouid33fu2dm0beqsto_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9r2vvcs92qgr7fa4ul20eptlkj6sr9va3bivg10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z66cub39oncdg9mqmkjau2djkipp7ig7uvh59fn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmlbup99vbf77g6valuir99ofh75fgqpmdlsod30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhc7s15f1q34nf8ooakijjb77888r2tadrop7osg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsis63agoguj7qrmq75gam3lt76p3v9p8vfsovjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfeu88k2kr3d7l96at4voq05uecpb82s5an1bbkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgee2ddik5l24h3e1362i7h53921qn5dvio481dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqr3c8ngo13aco7sepq545uh8lvrb0u8u941ucp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdsj6kusqrvsupa3ctl31lpab898lbb8pbgf1dko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z12b90jhh4h43egbpv3domed7kupvvh2eqirara0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjdo4315k0dln7cs74ep4ora67sefj8pvjodmu6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc0nld02oddtb8m9rg65es8n1m98lpnc349fkj0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z70j1g31g01tntfhu6ult9m5u759q3trfbl5vqjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zru4snqhdvr5659r0ttsqe58jdevbsbs1ml5msgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmig325iju5s3ntuujoc0467rnp5gugg1rsvgkng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ojpqh3ub7he3ofhk3ggras9t9jqfjmmq2qt5o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8f15j05cqej9quodsolgu59i0s075j2j2r59fdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob4c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcuvpefo8epb5eni8mbdft4cnlsskmn6ahi0jteo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3albtcu80t4mdlg99hjnvs027nnj90hs00llcm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2clh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp4kjkei7gqsjk2ejl5dqopj0lm5p8llpmkenkc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1im4ob2clh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrpeotpugn23nrvsvqm2m22rqlqfaaibn975hvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1imeo70cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f73lb7j11da36bp80pg63p2aqoub7541jtjn5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1imeo70cjh2bs)****[”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2701kk440ru3c4erbqtdlvokm1jktknuure21a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1imeo70cjh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlhu2idn9fqh3r2truvmp1a4usffg31f518430m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1imeo70cjh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrog4ibf7jink35tb3vji52e9u2ssoh6uvc3b00_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1imeo70cjh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4nbp32ir695q4sc16erj6k0isbl9ang188j3mu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1imeo70cjh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: (2) Penny, Steve Scalise
subject: Our next Majority Leader wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi Friend,
This is Penny with Republican HQ.
Our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, emailed you earlier but you never responded. He’s looking for individual input from Patriots we can trust.
_You’re at the top of our list, Friend!_
******[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW →](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pjYlcVIX4akUo7iqZ5p0Ug&sysid=1)**
Republican leaders don’t have much time until their playbook for the 2023 Congressional session is locked in. **Consider this your last and final chance to provide critical feedback to Congressional leaders.**
This is the first time Republicans have been in control of the House in FOUR years! Leaders like Steve Scalise want to make sure House Republicans start off on the right foot, so your feedback is critical to know where to begin.
[******Can you please take just a moment to complete Steve Scalise’s Majority Leader Survey now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98343%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vs8qo1jC56NKTlFgHAfI2Q&sysid=1)
Thank you,
Penny
Republican HQ
_P.S. If you missed Steve’s earlier message, I’ve attached it below for your convenience._
_\--------------------- (1) Missed Message from Steve Scalise ---------------------_

**Hi Friend -- It’s Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I’m looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you’re someone I know I can trust.
[******Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98344%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o0JNisD1VTpePKk130nM1A&sysid=1)
**Here’s some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
******[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW →](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pjYlcVIX4akUo7iqZ5p0Ug&sysid=1)**
Friend, time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_
[******Please, take just 2 minutes to answer some of the most important questions I’ve ever asked you before I meet with my top colleagues and Team Scalise to review your responses.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98455%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MuwMbwo8rvEennuGmg8pHA&sysid=1)

name: Your America
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7683%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=VJJGSSuKfundi33lZXWPjw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98498%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a721XJhPhZwLaJSm61UK8Q&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98499%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ym6q1MapUWRgKa2sC5y0Xg&sysid=1)****[”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98490%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M6zX01NsNzEFD5akfspX7g&sysid=1)[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98498%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a721XJhPhZwLaJSm61UK8Q&sysid=1)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98491%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xjvREez%2bP0VNQXNS%2bC7Z9g&sysid=1)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98492%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vpOD1fbx1L70GKMby%2fhg9A&sysid=1)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have t
|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0s9v4c0tjchvkeviahl8ategqoqhai2lp0omgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1hm1or4cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrj1aogknjsmr8phj310vgk64u6s4jpd2h1c2bo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1hm1or4cjh2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8hmvprauqbdeb32qbqf9ju3ta41akfqlg4e72tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1hm1or4cjh2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhe94d49chbtv0qp47jl4s9mvdhjg6afsgbdinn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1hm1or4cjh2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9e0c6de72nqsm2v031b1tbv89ekhno43b5j0cj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1hm1or4cjh2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qlgjv0ch41qecb4j3v74viqo47f2t9rjcjnjko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1hm1or4cjh2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: Socialists are spoon-feeding indoctrination to American high school students
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc1c22555bcd4abcaddb1abd0082f304&_e=lP1bmGbav9NQ4ka6dzX4X87REczK3qYyEutI15cRGKiwBUTHpmldVWp1vSiSllY7AkViF6nnWtw4qhIlztp0QlkZN6Mp9APdeJoIp62SCWrFayyQrgTtTq9tG4pvs_TAgnyqs-m4kCMiovSfw8oZvGR4nGyqftgCVhbWzdJqDrPBXwQUArGHbaUL0YHdi6GLtxDxOx7Wn_CTM-JdZOdoVCkN3wdKSqbCyjRBcL5xMHwLoI-dQc72jMWdEKl6Ei97nz-JuqypOUow1_eHwqZRNw%3D%3D)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc1c22555bcd4abcaddb1abd0082f304&_e=lP1bmGbav9NQ4ka6dzX4X87REczK3qYyEutI15cRGKiwBUTHpmldVWp1vSiSllY7AkViF6nnWtw4qhIlztp0QlkZN6Mp9APdeJoIp62SCWrwOsbQNzcTRQc5kBJ_I3mhAyjF94u-1HaIYnZ8lvLrbPxgl-7KcDE8MGwCRGh6K9XQeoFQPe5rSblwyTzvic1B6FZ5KDxhb7sbQOPRug2keYqYQJSzjjnY_VpBFJCBrGhoDAhZpCVE_u-c9NdfwYLDKhFDiPcJ7DPNmYIGKHKrmA%3D%3D)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc1c22555bcd4abcaddb1abd0082f304&_e=lP1bmGbav9NQ4ka6dzX4X87REczK3qYyEutI15cRGKiwBUTHpmldVWp1vSiSllY7AkViF6nnWtw4qhIlztp0QlkZN6Mp9APdeJoIp62SCWrkFAz9BTKlww46-uDF82qkaTFvRkU9AP5Xa-b5qHzva1AAVItmQl0htrxAhWN193pC2skxBHITSLZRInF1Ba5vbzsmKJdkPwXC98BECBRvbCFI5aDue28NQwjpE38vrX7hKkXYi3vJGJ8LYYyvLmOdOpymPtke3sQJYz1neczaZw%3D%3D)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc1c22555bcd4abcaddb1abd0082f304&_e=lP1bmGbav9NQ4ka6dzX4X87REczK3qYyEutI15cRGKiwBUTHpmldVWp1vSiSllY7AkViF6nnWtw4qhIlztp0QgeWIDGe2aNsJtZs33DVcyG5HFWI99_TeMoDKidbmym8uoARvojl-EzSBVPUcxBXPE77PhYpCMYLbwP3z0XbOnJ2xf1oy32wFVOM9j8VFLA2DiL4_hz08vKch9BxxmOSkux9JwwNSejlZ9DVYWqdy4bkAWffbMZnG0JBdx0WRDqRguUv2zivkW-eczj9LBmaoA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend, Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee. Here 's my family's story: My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory. Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! But all of that changed when the socialists took over. It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, Hugo Chavez was elected to office! Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill. Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars. Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity. Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless. Socialists blamed businessmen and greed. The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again. I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. Young Voice 's Dissident project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories. We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure. Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus. Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools. In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country. Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season. But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee. If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes. The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela. By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left. We can't let it happen in America. Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society. To do that, I need your help. Please donate any amount you can generously spare today. Thank you, Daniel Di Martino The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf9c4e16d3549a3a7716863ae383654&_e=SprVdXnhOAmTyNKJPAiWXrAPTXD_SEDt1tRx70Po5sf6Hbv44n3E8kX-t5TiV-Sv2F9aSxPLor7yxYZyxNp6_PhvijUFFxa7n893FeK8ypeGpqkEUsj8H7TPAhIxEhOm-YlCjYSoJy9tB6wUIFwBT95n3lvgskn-biiMBruZTrO8mBtYgNU26eq-Bc6_RthbDR6BNKBbKlzEEIx4tRG3BcnyK8qAZ8EBtZpF3_evXTV02fmuuDy4KNA-x8wgdA_fChvmfJ7lJdwwHOteut-ypHt1OrDcalMwu3qGqk_nuacKqD_cxfNCzM2Hswdz9CZ63jvJDYlmQ-quttWktkWwx_IXASWMvxoqRKAl3LeL_UA9UVC1rOcciv4OXmStf5bYiR741FIuu9uzN20eEoQuWdXJ6J7MkF0ngJT_44dM4DY%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdf9c4e16d3549a3a7716863ae383654&_e=SprVdXnhOAmTyNKJPAiWXrAPTXD_SEDt1tRx70Po5sf6Hbv44n3E8kX-t5TiV-Sv2F9aSxPLor7yxYZyxNp6_PhvijUFFxa7n893FeK8ypeGpqkEUsj8H7TPAhIxEhOm-YlCjYSoJy9tB6wUIFwBT95n3lvgskn-biiMBruZTrO8mBtYgNU26eq-Bc6_RthbDR6BNKBbKlzEEIx4tRG3BcnyK8qAZ8EBtZpF3_evXTV02fmuuDy4KNA-x8wgdA_f2bYI7t9lpaWNEwTmUqiRNmj78PQJfv92_AbuoFrSW0GpWcr6mkzpAtGWieP4fx88MIkQqhXn5SSncGsphp6et4A1vqJFXGM6xmZgQsf6WS5i2VvjQtWCyrfFR9SABz11Yr51YSgTBPFFFg_dc0s5Fm8THLe7RVqI5kKQnuf7XB8%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aab93ff3c4904e9396d15704865fd915&_e=FGAzQQLbW8EPkj5TQV0L9VUBDoEQLkWq6S8UzKIMn_5hwPKTLttWzXc7xaOYr7KN1uoYAp_s5slmBcC5hZzn8aqMzkEy5XaYXLdeJWTaE_IOvj4UuwA0KAd6LcghRs-1zuJ_8WdOWbcj7n3DFd3kf8bO1kvh-0vpB37XW4i49m3cy4p071KrGjfZNCe2wix9qw0P4Im0mE7G-dQWBxgBU_ZgTVVInQphdTEW8tsQ8U-QHy9MYZytfaQnd4MCIel22uE35rE0isUJDeg_o5o63AQY8B6gfWGga_p-81GtynlKNY-4bJ_y0__YnOu-pS1wa1CrKmHqgsc6PoVii3-D1cpwEfrQG17Uh43Bu8f3bog89_Yy1FImozamra7R-L8kgHbs4b93arBZ9xgBZYrQag%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aab93ff3c4904e9396d15704865fd915&_e=FGAzQQLbW8EPkj5TQV0L9VUBDoEQLkWq6S8UzKIMn_5hwPKTLttWzXc7xaOYr7KN1uoYAp_s5slmBcC5hZzn8aqMzkEy5XaYXLdeJWTaE_IOvj4UuwA0KAd6LcghRs-1zuJ_8WdOWbcj7n3DFd3kf8bO1kvh-0vpB37XW4i49m3cy4p071KrGjfZNCe2wix9qw0P4Im0mE7G-dQWBxgBU_ZgTVVInQphdTEW8tsQ8U-QHy9MYZytfaQnd4MCIel21RzoFEHdbmr8pgtOuMtwuUpAWl5O37ONpD-XelCLi5OOpFT8oVR0Ix1PQCmMjumc0eoq90_I0QHzdnKSPyPp0vmZm8OWYv4twlv7IJVfu-Vg02k7xrac4ca8i21Nuvc50kUsTaYLpr_ZCUEMk0-UYA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b83d6af456e5462084ccc4538ab979c1&_e=j2zshOYXRBh2vvtCGSXDjASLm3sH9hKxowu0EPvGjRiyO5pxYIoVjC8fi81G4S4UfIC_bK_FVZj5S9OBoImddI4lKGDVFdI8r5coMKSQxz4nquPGktK3FIpc6FZd4S45QP2dJ-Tjyz9rKNk06VjujqSnWepjhWGnMAmQZDZtxMdyGnrtES-WFBUfaC9Zggyp_WBXlnUBdhwa1Nm7Rw9iS2A6LEVy1GhGVTgUOry20OjEs_imxvPdFsxTH5g1t1XpcwwRNKK8LOO9BB4qd1MCTmMIfpaK4CFemKCbhZGC0_eEV9R5RPdEDf3i6Rb7kBmAh7MnFzQF6TxPdQHOeMHIci4iYaJiWvMa_BNohrJgbvZy1hDajOtKOfLoWpiFg6ab)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b83d6af456e5462084ccc4538ab979c1&_e=j2zshOYXRBh2vvtCGSXDjASLm3sH9hKxowu0EPvGjRiyO5pxYIoVjC8fi81G4S4UfIC_bK_FVZj5S9OBoImddI4lKGDVFdI8r5coMKSQxz4nquPGktK3FIpc6FZd4S45QP2dJ-Tjyz9rKNk06VjujqSnWepjhWGnMAmQZDZtxMdyGnrtES-WFBUfaC9Zggyp_WBXlnUBdhwa1Nm7Rw9iS2A6LEVy1GhGVTgUOry20OjLYyctKjRk7S2ZzcNBnnExnNBs8SHLhj5qUFMtFhZ_Sz1q3e1Yfib9TUA8NqkHisf12GusSrXhJMerJ14ZtHPSbOzYfwuV4-DbMfkuXx_k-hRrJuJX3I7A9Yo1ONvZbZiYdpOlIf5aArV6HPdcYrfh)****["](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b83d6af456e5462084ccc4538ab979c1&_e=j2zshOYXRBh2vvtCGSXDjASLm3sH9hKxowu0EPvGjRiyO5pxYIoVjC8fi81G4S4UfIC_bK_FVZj5S9OBoImddI4lKGDVFdI8r5coMKSQxz4nquPGktK3FIpc6FZd4S45QP2dJ-Tjyz9rKNk06VjujqSnWepjhWGnMAmQZDZtxMdyGnrtES-WFBUfaC9Zggyp_WBXlnUBdhwa1Nm7Rw9iS2A6LEVy1GhGVTgUOry20Ogki8zsD08__LtLtOPGsqkp0ZajiOepJueNDwF8IBb9ag1s3IzTrjRBdHfcRdZYb-z_gWHCTtqMxbRAK9Z4H5YBzpOEMtZh2SU8pU_s8SXefLJ62SDCSyUuBoh2xsIcxY2BZEFfzj97FVjU_RU60mIU) --is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b83d6af456e5462084ccc4538ab979c1&_e=j2zshOYXRBh2vvtCGSXDjASLm3sH9hKxowu0EPvGjRiyO5pxYIoVjC8fi81G4S4UfIC_bK_FVZj5S9OBoImddI4lKGDVFdI8r5coMKSQxz4nquPGktK3FIpc6FZd4S45QP2dJ-Tjyz9rKNk06VjujqSnWepjhWGnMAmQZDZtxMdyGnrtES-WFBUfaC9Zggyp_WBXlnUBdhwa1Nm7Rw9iS2A6LEVy1GhGVTgUOry20OjCqhoH7e2bdQuYNB-eLk-Tk1mb8n_FQXCtSP0To5CG-TsoxHFNkxCAcgP0d8pNuf-oeV7TTTO1bKJ2P1CgA-SlIMKff6VX7RK92tZlllTIKB5n4yEdFTtiLIdpdBOYR-pAzSsJ6_nmJWzr7E7gcc9A)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b83d6af456e5462084ccc4538ab979c1&_e=j2zshOYXRBh2vvtCGSXDjASLm3sH9hKxowu0EPvGjRiyO5pxYIoVjC8fi81G4S4UfIC_bK_FVZj5S9OBoImddI4lKGDVFdI8r5coMKSQxz4nquPGktK3FIpc6FZd4S45QP2dJ-Tjyz9rKNk06VjujqSnWepjhWGnMAmQZDZtxMdyGnrtES-WFBUfaC9Zggyp_WBXlnUBdhwa1Nm7Rw9iS2A6LEVy1GhGVTgUOry20OirpoTlFbhKjvupf8w29LulshEB9SuvaIv7rHNwCIpPLOf7IEmGqLwIqT0vRvFX-vcebSE1z0HdfLr7W2aEh--CAacTx6Fkvro2ixBZHbPw_JIMcRygkFnzs_w1bfwAER6fXvQwfzZQtd3c4bdcqL_x)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Now, Democrats are trying any desperate attempt to force Amy Coney Barrett off the court and replace her with a Far-Left Radical! If Democrats take control of the Supreme Court, they'll destroy our Conservative legacy in the blink of an eye. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs4tk47acsqg14mv57dqscm25s2848g5ghuid8l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1jmeor2c5h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfi5fvbpquhsubo00128161tsoqvqnfupt2t0crg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1jmeor2c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb13m0sj0hq0m45f6lh4h1qdaa230o9b2a5dch2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1jmeor2c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema’s donors got what they paid for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, __ If you’re a private equity millionaire, then Kyrsten Sinema was probably one of your favorite people this year. The headlines really say it all:

* * *
Since 2017 Sinema’s campaign has received nearly $2.3 million in PAC and campaign contributions from the securities and investment industry, and her track record this year shows they won big on their investment. Sinema’s work to protect the carried interest loophole is saving Wall Street BILLIONS per year. Meanwhile, she famously voted against raising the minimum wage for hard-working everyday Americans. [**Sinema’s Wall Street cash shows exactly where her loyalties are, and it’s not with Arizonans. name: Letitia James
subject: Will you join my 2023 focus group, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Please Peter, will you participate in my focus group so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a minute of your time.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56434805/384993460/265476937?code=jtk929-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxMDkzMC01MDg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oza-_oc6hpiqBkAZt1ooTL9P5AIghUiqmNTmNJit6UY=)
---
**Peter, because of all your engagement with my campaign this year, I’ve selected you to take part in my exclusive 2023 focus group.****** Here’s why your opinion is so valuable to me:

I wasn’t born to a family of power or privilege. I didn’t attend a fancy private school or have any special connections with the people who made the laws that directly affected my neighborhood.

In short, I was voiceless – and when I became your attorney general, I vowed to never let another New Yorker feel the same. That’s why I’m reaching out to you with this invitation to participate in my focus group –******but it’s only open until midnight tonight, and I am hoping to get 1,000 responses to it by then.**
[**Please Peter, will you participate in my focus group so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a minute of your time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56434806/384993461/-179586103?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&cid=128810098&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk929-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxMDkzMC01MDg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oza-_oc6hpiqBkAZt1ooTL9P5AIghUiqmNTmNJit6UY=&emci=6d94f699-1d81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b7e10930-5085-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID:****128810098**
PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP? NO
DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56434807/384993462/-179586103?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&cid=128810098&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk929-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxMDkzMC01MDg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oza-_oc6hpiqBkAZt1ooTL9P5AIghUiqmNTmNJit6UY=&emci=6d94f699-1d81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b7e10930-5085-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
---
_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._
---
Together, we’ve made _real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but to be honest, we have our work cut out for us in the new year. With the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights and gun safety reform will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to forge the path for progress.

Peter, before I solidify my plans for 2023, I need to know what fearless fighters like _you_ think. **But I just pulled your record, and it looks like you still haven’t accepted my personal invitation to this focus group.**
So I have to ask: **[Will you please take a moment now to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56434809/384993463/-179586103?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&cid=128810098&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk929-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxMDkzMC01MDg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oza-_oc6hpiqBkAZt1ooTL9P5AIghUiqmNTmNJit6UY=&emci=6d94f699-1d81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b7e10930-5085-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)**

Letitia

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db551684ce7439497173634bc9dbb09&_e=Dg-WaLmO4ATxI7yBPr4H0uLhxBSq3YsAG0kuMSyeOGceqAagUq9xTLdv2-gsSz5Zn4CcZCY-v9EUU-JAnt1BrJF-vJzT-MYTHSPjfyyGolzB-l9QIAEomGe62anKvH_KbWhBSBqSKCTiCQbXOJh8_fApZ2rMUBfXus6G5MmSxvLcW9p079l9Cdk8N4OyqSFjj1keeHPQFxjOBy4V3Ij9QlynZqaEjKK8j8_-lFKIf3W49oxmMnmDe5i6l4ymcBAykazQ39d0dFURkapMJBCXUBBnVV2aV_wHjQ_zQ0EpO9B4ITSi5AMVprXwvqsda6s92uvU5DwPbluAcJUThPR4xhi0dg61DMCQmIu5atF7DIznxy7RbrWd3_MoyVCxbbUy)

| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db551684ce7439497173634bc9dbb09&_e=Dg-WaLmO4ATxI7yBPr4H0uLhxBSq3YsAG0kuMSyeOGceqAagUq9xTLdv2-gsSz5Zn4CcZCY-v9EUU-JAnt1BrJF-vJzT-MYTHSPjfyyGolzB-l9QIAEomGe62anKvH_KbWhBSBqSKCTiCQbXOJh8_fApZ2rMUBfXus6G5MmSxvLcW9p079l9Cdk8N4OyqSFjj1keeHPQFxjOBy4V3Ij9QlynZqaEjKK8j8_-lFKIf3Xb0RyBFEtJDUbvegh6EmGUB1l-kD89MqDzvUc2xERmBGJZDxqa5jXYdMpWmduuABpA9tTN4o93phn0doOMuNdR0DNNUKBUHEvu_CYDwK297GsbrPtlEhwco9yKvoneJDcZ1IlagWwyac-6TuusnMEL)****["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db551684ce7439497173634bc9dbb09&_e=Dg-WaLmO4ATxI7yBPr4H0uLhxBSq3YsAG0kuMSyeOGceqAagUq9xTLdv2-gsSz5Zn4CcZCY-v9EUU-JAnt1BrJF-vJzT-MYTHSPjfyyGolzB-l9QIAEomGe62anKvH_KbWhBSBqSKCTiCQbXOJh8_fApZ2rMUBfXus6G5MmSxvLcW9p079l9Cdk8N4OyqSFjj1keeHPQFxjOBy4V3Ij9QlynZqaEjKK8j8_-lFKIf3VGbo0u2U1ZdtFQLN2nhJdV-0IWLfbuY85a99NQR3jflFjtPKR7-w49HqE08ZYPNV7El4fyL-fdNwlb5KtJBRL3yrRHPVH26zPis6wo6RKAuAklSykipRpzJyB3BEx2HOmT7hzSvNwklwWhNzid8BgD) --is now available as a free online video series.**

| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db551684ce7439497173634bc9dbb09&_e=Dg-WaLmO4ATxI7yBPr4H0uLhxBSq3YsAG0kuMSyeOGceqAagUq9xTLdv2-gsSz5Zn4CcZCY-v9EUU-JAnt1BrJF-vJzT-MYTHSPjfyyGolzB-l9QIAEomGe62anKvH_KbWhBSBqSKCTiCQbXOJh8_fApZ2rMUBfXus6G5MmSxvLcW9p079l9Cdk8N4OyqSFjj1keeHPQFxjOBy4V3Ij9QlynZqaEjKK8j8_-lFKIf3X0Sicw05NTeu8Ewyd4L0UlP2LfRK0wQqyf_spjYcI6mW1xIfzuqjNvKyC-RbbH62AU7rN73ql1hfYZPoQyoW-US1FsQfdMYzHs4U1e3m8YGf81Q-4D0gjyxRSVxBZpuljrn05xcgHFp_fdgHIeRiSG)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This seminar --titled --is now available as a free online video series. | | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into: The origins and leaders of the Great Reset How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset The Great Reset from China's perspective Alternatives to the Great Reset You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hey team, There’s less than one week left in 2022, which means there’s less than one week until our final fundraising deadline of the year! In a moment, **[I’m going to ask if you can pitch in toward our End-of-Year goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56424471/384956732/-1148906397?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221226eoy1_wm_od90ds_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2UyZjM0My0yZTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDGrT7QV5mhnHSZB9JBoJRNHBHt88yaJvdzsq92FJc8=)** but before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain why your contribution matters. **Once 2023 begins, our campaign will only have 17 days to fundraise before we enter a fundraising freeze.** On January 18, Aruna and I will be sworn-in as your new Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland, and we’ll officially be in-session. That means we have a very limited amount of time to rebuild our resources and ensure we have what it takes to sustain our movement for the long haul. While Aruna and I focus on serving the people of Maryland and delivering on our vision for a state that leaves no one behind, _**we still need to keep this movement active by organizing and communicating with Marylanders in every community**_ — that’s where your grassroots contributions come in. **We need to raise $75,000 before the clock strikes midnight on December 31 in order to reach our goal and rebuild our financial resources to fuel our movement over these next few months while fundraising is on pause.** [So, can I count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can afford right now to help hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56424472/384956733/-1148906397?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221226eoy1_wm_od90ds_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2UyZjM0My0yZTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDGrT7QV5mhnHSZB9JBoJRNHBHt88yaJvdzsq92FJc8=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: American Briefing
subject: Watch these videos today
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr323j6he1ocooicp1bnto0q4srscuclo16kefm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1ge2o76c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvrj7afnqlaenhn0rctibstvksi88mgv9vnl604g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1ge2o76c5h2bs)****[”](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuptbi6as2t03o6todna8dtamu53fcd7ci8jqlfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1ge2o76c5h2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z65s9p7bbl3b9sqdpbrgn80tc6dkjn620n9jimh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1ge2o76c5h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo4p8m6em388vo4065eto12a207m387r8n6pl480_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1ge2o76c5h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znifmakk4c5dkdf1vpeaqbuqvgu04dlvorvkampo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1ge2o76c5h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
