body:
---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJx1UcGO3CAM_ZrklihxJkAOOexstJdpV-qpvSEGnBl2gaRANkq_viSabXuphBB-fu_Z2NjXhEJFWFWTXPUgGUiZ6x4qgBqA1G3NqrZUV9khYSiEolJRyE7Vql2pJieMeot-sXMpJ5vf-66qaqY6ykTLoKtHUrHrSJVqVQ2KNdfc9PcY55A1Txm8pBNQLh7LZOdR7SY7Jj6wEBa9lqJ4m7SLxbg45YUO2t2KRLI6RsREnacQC-HctDiJFhPTC2O2wiLGvUDz4vcCPumyZkidJhGxk8ONzwbVDf-iwiaTmOK2StESLbeo9GITglZow-_jAw_T4uWudNJwgIYr98hIYWehby7lPkfI_9diWBHnEMU7huJDz_zfafIgPh0nF_Fo63iFyOW8-cBp29FE4c5olZKvdLmuG57VzwO8a5VGPJzIdRuftq_fct-redXG6EBo2t5t_9CxstSw0ePWZ_ScARw6gGM7cDmdf7ySy_fLULx_Yb-KgbSndc_Cc7rjNuMf6sOlPAa1o3T4DW4Ixq0)
Friend,

_I want YOU to be my VIP._

I am already preparing to host my first Rally since I announced my 2024 Presidential Campaign.
**When I hold this EPIC RALLY, I want YOU, my favorite Patriot, to be there as my special VIP guest.**
Friend, I am giving you **PREMIUM ACCESS** to enter to win a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME trip to my first rally following my big announcement. If you win:
_**We’ll cover your flights and your hotel.
You’ll get VIP tickets to the rally.

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91f6a4cf2b6d4d8aa39a3a73a77a39b6&_e=panAjEWX81zF60BwHgM7FRMKrF_X5W6NA-cwDct60gp5Cy9oWQjE2mTGdo9FStiiATFFfwoSDXSqn9Z3SxYIh2vdjs9o0Rba2sLE1bS7YybjRnWSfeej_oq8dqvTWVuESdnCEmrI168Sj4qul1W0F0GteNZbr-jitXgc18CsnfWVDgJt8Mg-c54dkAcZXrk3BHwe4FxteO0vwBq160bPDYyBHNxQpX6FuUskoClMIRL3Spudyoi6A42oBocNVRqsSbURnBv7_zDB20P-T923RhKLW3qXgPD8hm7KglK7H42Id4xg4tXGJ9l87m8zRs9E0rIzbweT1Ygb2qUD8uRlHOeqq5boYE8na0QGV83Tax1WCr7SLWia5lNX4NUg-M86)

| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91f6a4cf2b6d4d8aa39a3a73a77a39b6&_e=panAjEWX81zF60BwHgM7FRMKrF_X5W6NA-cwDct60gp5Cy9oWQjE2mTGdo9FStiiATFFfwoSDXSqn9Z3SxYIh2vdjs9o0Rba2sLE1bS7YybjRnWSfeej_oq8dqvTWVuESdnCEmrI168Sj4qul1W0F0GteNZbr-jitXgc18CsnfWVDgJt8Mg-c54dkAcZXrk3BHwe4FxteO0vwBq160bPDYyBHNxQpX6FuUskoClMIRIRkUIYLyX4j-mEI2FBt8wWKFXAgWQgzEvBO_e9oCLnjot7NcGZ66hzZ2Ly6OdzYDfLo_xfUBXyB6j-kTY2iN23YkfxDawVZQgMcP4Yc15bR6mw9ubNeGay-TGOU1rZmdmpsKyUeeIvQYUXHrnoGgWJ)****["](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91f6a4cf2b6d4d8aa39a3a73a77a39b6&_e=panAjEWX81zF60BwHgM7FRMKrF_X5W6NA-cwDct60gp5Cy9oWQjE2mTGdo9FStiiATFFfwoSDXSqn9Z3SxYIh2vdjs9o0Rba2sLE1bS7YybjRnWSfeej_oq8dqvTWVuESdnCEmrI168Sj4qul1W0F0GteNZbr-jitXgc18CsnfWVDgJt8Mg-c54dkAcZXrk3BHwe4FxteO0vwBq160bPDYyBHNxQpX6FuUskoClMIRJ77UOoIb8am8FBYxmGK9V4zXxTDjzB9iVSYscqPDGMlXik7-p9E0WK__EUEVe-Qd_gZ46UW6E5tdwVqWGdZR4eySrPubZhHQsyCyowWmbFzhtWH65yo-KIZe6S3s3s5AmPHy_uEYP0B2ut2JgC8Dbn) --is now available as a free online video series.**

* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91f6a4cf2b6d4d8aa39a3a73a77a39b6&_e=panAjEWX81zF60BwHgM7FRMKrF_X5W6NA-cwDct60gp5Cy9oWQjE2mTGdo9FStiiATFFfwoSDXSqn9Z3SxYIh2vdjs9o0Rba2sLE1bS7YybjRnWSfeej_oq8dqvTWVuESdnCEmrI168Sj4qul1W0F0GteNZbr-jitXgc18CsnfWVDgJt8Mg-c54dkAcZXrk3BHwe4FxteO0vwBq160bPDYyBHNxQpX6FuUskoClMIRKp_gtNVo8VqmckUbbcPCepd0cRaHXocnXub1cVG1EDP9TPcksoIPqwtPziEoAzT8G6lUw8k3dwHpRjoD14VyKxKW14Vdfv83qhgtAsRSvfGRLOr4nwJwrIdZE2zVQvkZ15_BoLmNNFB7OEol7MyP80)**

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Happy holidays, reflections on 2022, plans for 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56443893/385001759/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGU5NzU3OS01ZDg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0UUWNoZpCgw84gzYLPyRDliW78xAATiDARRYTKHUe4=&emci=2a5e8fd6-5485-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b0e97579-5d85-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, As we head toward the new year, I want to wish you and yours a happy holiday season. I'm spending some much-needed time with family, reflecting on the whirlwind that 2022 was, and looking forward to the opportunity to serve my community in Congress in 2023. It's hard to believe that it's been more than six weeks since election night. And things haven't slowed down since November 8th - the weekend after the election I was on a plane to DC for new member orientation, a chance to meet my new colleagues from across the country and get a crash course in setting up my office. **I will never forget the moment that I stepped onto the floor of the House of Representatives for the first time. It was a moving experience as I realized that – because of your support – I will be a member of Congress and serve in this august body like so many other great American leaders before me. It is both a great honor and a great responsibility, one that I don't take lightly. I will work every single day to serve in this role to the best of my ability.** I won't know my committee assignments for the 118th United States Congress until the new year, but I'm preparing my policy agenda and I'm very much already at work. It's a lot to take in and I'm fortunate to have some tremendous staff support. **Karmen Fore** , who has extensive experience in both state and federal policy, will be my Chief of Staff. **Dan Whelan** will continue in his role as state director for the district office and I am fortunate that most of the talented people who worked for Congressman Peter DeFazio will be staying on with my office to ensure a smooth transition for the 4th District. Peter DeFazio stood out in Congress for many reasons, not the least of which was his attention to constituent service and his willingness to fight for the people in his district. I'm committed to maintaining Peter's focus on making sure that every corner of this district is having their priorities heard and their needs addressed. I'm also committed to being a strong voice for infrastructure investments here in our part of the state. Developing the deep water container port in Coos Bay remains a top priority, along with securing expedited funding to replace the seismically unstable dams that supply water to the City of Newport and expanding broadband access throughout the district. We also have a number of smaller projects across the district that I'll be fighting for, like repairing the 42nd street levy in Springfield, that will make a big difference for local residents and businesses. **I'll have a lot more to share with you in the new year, and I hope you'll continue to read these updates so I can keep you in the loop on the latest developments in Congress and the work I'm doing for the 4th District.** For now, from my family to yours, best wishes for the holiday season and a happy and healthy new year. All the best, _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Peter, As we head toward the new year, I want to wish you and yours a happy holiday season. I'm spending some much-needed time with family, reflecting on the whirlwind that 2022 was, and looking forward to the opportunity to serve my community in Congress in 2023. It's hard to believe that it's been more than six weeks since election night. And things haven't slowed down since November 8th - the weekend after the election I was on a plane to DC for new member orientation, a chance to meet my new colleagues from across the country and get a crash course in setting up my office. I will never forget the moment that I stepped onto the floor of the House of Representatives for the first time. It was a moving experience as I realized that – because of your support – I will be a member of Congress and serve in this august body like so many other great American leaders before me. It is both a great honor and a great responsibility, one that I don't take lightly. I will work every single day to serve in this role to the best of my ability. I won't know my committee assignments for the 118th United States Congress until the new year, but I'm preparing my policy agenda and I'm very much already at work. It's a lot to take in and I'm fortunate to have some tremendous staff support. Karmen Fore , who has extensive experience in both state and federal policy, will be my Chief of Staff. Dan Whelan will continue in his role as state director for the district office and I am fortunate that most of the talented people who worked for Congressman Peter DeFazio will be staying on with my office to ensure a smooth transition for the 4th District. Peter DeFazio stood out in Congress for many reasons, not the least of which was his attention to constituent service and his willingness to fight for the people in his district. I'm committed to maintaining Peter's focus on making sure that every corner of this district is having their priorities heard and their needs addressed. I'm also committed to being a strong voice for infrastructure investments here in our part of the state. Developing the deep water container port in Coos Bay remains a top priority, along with securing expedited funding to replace the seismically unstable dams that supply water to the City of Newport and expanding broadband access throughout the district. We also have a number of smaller projects across the district that I'll be fighting for, like repairing the 42nd street levy in Springfield, that will make a big difference for local residents and businesses. I'll have a lot more to share with you in the new year, and I hope you'll continue to read these updates so I can keep you in the loop on the latest developments in Congress and the work I'm doing for the 4th District. For now, from my family to yours, best wishes for the holiday season and a happy and healthy new year. All the best, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Thank you for 2022, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate Menendez for Senate
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56429243/384974885/309742506?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTAyNTU4OS0zYTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqzqpQm4haU5ZpJBnjodJz8DhFzyxOz2trridP_dQIA=&emci=49ff5cf9-5f7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=61025589-3a85-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=28243070)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56429244/384974886/610117055?refcode=em22_221226_EOY_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTAyNTU4OS0zYTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqzqpQm4haU5ZpJBnjodJz8DhFzyxOz2trridP_dQIA=)
Happy holidays team,

As the year comes to a close, I'm grateful to those who've always supported me — my family, friends, our team, and most importantly, you.

Heeding the call of the ballot box, the fight for democracy and your unwavering devotion to pushing progress forward, we've made strides toward a better future for all throughout the year. Passing the Respect for Marriage Act, a bipartisan gun violence prevention bill, and a bill to protect the security of judges and their families was only possible because of you.

That's why I wanted to thank you personally team because as we dive into 2023 head first, our fight continues. We have a lot to work for: voting rights, bolstering health care, addressing climate change, and that's just the beginning.

To continue this fight and start the new year on the right foot, my team has set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the year, but we need to know that you're with us. **[Team, can you show your support by chipping in $5 or whatever you can to support progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56429245/384974887/610117055?refcode=em22_221226_EOY_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTAyNTU4OS0zYTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqzqpQm4haU5ZpJBnjodJz8DhFzyxOz2trridP_dQIA=) **
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56429246/384974888/610117055?refcode=em22_221226_EOY_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTAyNTU4OS0zYTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqzqpQm4haU5ZpJBnjodJz8DhFzyxOz2trridP_dQIA=)
---
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56429247/384974889/610117055?refcode=em22_221226_EOY_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTAyNTU4OS0zYTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqzqpQm4haU5ZpJBnjodJz8DhFzyxOz2trridP_dQIA=)**
Now more than ever, I need your support as we head into the New Year. Republicans have taken the House, but we still hold the Senate, and our fight continues. clean_body: | = Happy holidays team, As the year comes to a close, I'm grateful to those who've always supported me — my family, friends, our team, and most importantly, you. Heeding the call of the ballot box, the fight for democracy and your unwavering devotion to pushing progress forward, we've made strides toward a better future for all throughout the year. Passing the Respect for Marriage Act, a bipartisan gun violence prevention bill, and a bill to protect the security of judges and their families was only possible because of you. That's why I wanted to thank you personally team because as we dive into 2023 head first, our fight continues. We have a lot to work for: voting rights, bolstering health care, addressing climate change, and that's just the beginning. To continue this fight and start the new year on the right foot, my team has set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the year, but we need to know that you're with us. = | = = Now more than ever, I need your support as we head into the New Year. Republicans have taken the House, but we still hold the Senate, and our fight continues. Any progress we make will not be won easily, but we will never stop pushing forward. Thank you for your generosity, compassion, and kindness this holiday season. = = It's never mattered more, — Bob = = *

body:
Help us shape our 2023 agenda | | | Hi Peter, You've been such a huge part of our success this year, which is why we specifically wanted your help shaping our 2023 agenda. Here's a sneak peek at the priorities that we are planning for 2023:
1. **Continue to improve Democratic organizing** in rural states that have been in the red territory for far too long.
2. Fight for increased access to voting and voter education in rural communities to **increase voter turnout.**
3. Support rural **Democratic candidates up and down the ballot** as they prepare for the 2024 election cycle.

We need _your_ help to make all of these goals a reality. That's why we want you to have a say in our 2023 agenda. **Reply to this email to tell us what you think should be added to this list.** We can't do this without you, Peter, and we can't wait to hear your thoughts on how to keep the Democratic flame alive in rural America. body:
This New York Times report just SHOCKED US to the core:

| **Peter – This New York Times report just SHOCKED US to the core:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56430329/384979460/-400896444?amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20221226_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmN2ZjZWJmLTNlODUtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=97bxGH0_fNM7tO7mkRFA30mLbAyjFWdG9hHE0NYqMQI=) Just when we thought we were safe with a Democratic President AND Senate Majority, we’re reminded that _Republicans will stop at nothing to win._

_Even if it means cheating and rigging the system against us!_

We refuse to sit back and let Republicans ruin fair elections and steal hard-fought victories from us.

body:

Greetings friend!

When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears!

Talk about being caught off guard!

Then I realized...

I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...

I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust.

Let me tell you...

[Tactical Balaclavas](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11026/6374453/f9c14dc330220fd6768a3c7ae9fbbe501578a3ac/405ee425dd35f4658cd991bec7a058cded29d681) are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast.

They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for.

They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances.

I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time.

And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays...

[If you buy one balaclava, they’re giving away an additional 3 (THREE) for FREE! ](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11026/6374453/f9c14dc330220fd6768a3c7ae9fbbe501578a3ac/405ee425dd35f4658cd991bec7a058cded29d681)

That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal!

For real, hurry up before they run out...

With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick!

Don’t lose out, [go here now](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11026/6374453/f9c14dc330220fd6768a3c7ae9fbbe501578a3ac/405ee425dd35f4658cd991bec7a058cded29d681) and get some for yourself and your friends.

All the best,

clean_body: I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck... | | | Unsubscribe . We'll miss you - so will great opportunities. To view this email as a webpage, click ==. | | | Greetings friend! When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears! Talk about being caught off guard! Then I realized... I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck... I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust. Let me tell you... are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast. They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for. They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances. I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time. And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays... That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal! For real, hurry up before they run out... With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick! Don’t lose out, and get some for yourself and your friends. name: Democrats.org
subject: Derek, let’s talk about how we can win up and down the ballot by making statewide investments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Thanks to your grassroots support, the DNC’s early investments had a powerful multiplier effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. But our work is far from over. | |
---
The DNC’s early investments had a powerful **multiplier** effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. Check out just a few of these results we were proud to help play a part in:
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq9eXcRgkcrQhGEzLcvPfCE1_bBlgkeJWJPi-jQJT6slIg0KlfZ7ywu5SiPi8PtlfxdD1dWwEbkhZM9zqILmuyaSSfdvTZwGknMX7Na99j2dTEo0zSp9CORDxM7-ohZ8IIFGlg_i5mL4KvPVMfSm-k8UslVRXJzSdqdx-MjE9we5YyNcTOjqxIAzapGVPiaaSVj29jlnJHsOIt4ojXulmrIM48MSNzy2Q4-unVB-Q_2436fhNl-3D88wHc9zw83tkt_pqOeDX1FKlQuRS-QgfSdYnOUh2eGyNyxSsOBEmyWMN3pSZG3eOYDyd001h4fh8MKyrRPul9eyjJG-y7KLHyi9Wanqo7bLfU5J4jz3qIy_4uiYYv1yE18HUtPA33f9qLLm0ARsJmT1h62YZZyTQnCcDGgrVkjwnTCVvrmaCgxQ4rb_epBT2CnC5Gnnhwly9KbnEbQzDhrgkFKWsN8yKTX1ZR_Ye2g2dnU5bDZX917POks7jgQp3Y9oiI9khKAuKOw2jrqYqSr5aIzXVR4aEoAocT5D6UsZdvA6_xrqhKSkFh7HZIE4RB3U5UycZcNRyBpI4RZHcoMqR6krhmVs8Lp0/3sb/3aAR5XZ8RgSiECyrnKWkeg/h0/obnerqfWAzalBvo53rnkjUB6afVcQpf7dZEJpDoaM_Y)
Grassroots support helped make this possible, Derek. **But our work is far from over.** You may have heard me talk about **Nested Opportunities** before. Nested opportunities are states where we have the chance to double _(or even triple!)_ our impact by increasing our investments _right now_ so we can lift Democratic candidates to victory in multiple races. What kinds of investments? Programs in on-the-ground organizing, voter protection services, data and technology infrastructure, and so much more that will make all the difference in our fight ahead. **We _know_ these investments paid off -- we saw the success of these early investments this past November.** **[With 2023 just days away, right now is a pivotal moment to build on these programs so that Democratic campaigns can cash in on them come Election Day. clean_body: Thanks to your grassroots support, the DNC’s early investments had a powerful multiplier effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. But our work is far from over. | | The DNC’s early investments had a powerful multiplier effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. Check out just a few of these results we were proud to help play a part in: Grassroots support helped make this possible, Derek. But our work is far from over. You may have heard me talk about Nested Opportunities before. Nested opportunities are states where we have the chance to double (or even triple!) our impact by increasing our investments right now so we can lift Democratic candidates to victory in multiple races. What kinds of investments? Programs in on-the-ground organizing, voter protection services, data and technology infrastructure, and so much more that will make all the difference in our fight ahead. We know these investments paid off -- we saw the success of these early investments this past November. Thank you so much for reading through -- let’s defend and build on the progress we’ve made. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ffe68660714fe58f26fa6923f2b3b3&_e=RzjyJdUThaFfoCLyRSM8osVROb_n81bw6B07UWZuOfwIJvsu2-VPm50ztXVyCX0igqw9riI2RYbp3A8q4u0HsVAhpOaTntBhc7dUG2iL5opD88XDhWPso_v3NyCMUhP4ldWImFuP0IZhNZjkXUNZtCUZH8EbGZ2dPK3d5xpJ0FuA2Jst32__tSXRAXgOMUs_UCB1-l2FatGattVtJ5xmagQtonMdHl0T600LgHzsNgl7WYbl06TNi0IZauk8amubCeMtVsmqoWcRptOMnk8auRTD37bENBHNDmrn21VGc8I%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. body:
It’ll only take a moment. | | |

clean_body: It’ll only take a moment. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I know there’s a lot going on right now, and I sincerely hope that you and your family had a lovely Christmas if you celebrate. I really appreciate you taking the time to read my email. I’m emailing you because my husband, Dr. Raul Ruiz, needs your help. When my husband first became an emergency room physician, he took an oath to do no harm. And I know that Raul ran for Congress for that very same reason. I see it every day when he fights for affordable health care in Congress. | | | | | | | I know Raul hates to ask you for money, but the truth is, he can’t win future reelections without your generous support. He needs your support to keep fighting to make this country a better place for us all – no matter where we come from. So can you do me a favor and chip in whatever you can afford to help my husband win? | | | | | | Sincerely, Monica Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. We absolutely agree with Robert Reich!
Just look at this list of things that WILL NOT pass unless the Senate ends the Filibuster:
● Protecting and Expanding Voting Rights
● Expanding Social Security
● Codifying Roe v. Wade
● Increasing Minimum Wage
● And SO MUCH MORE.
So we’re sending a message to the Senate to pressure them to choose DEMOCRACY over the FILIBUSTER.
That’s why we’re rushing to get 10,000 signatures on our petition to pressure the Senate to ABOLISH the Filibuster and save our Democracy. But we need 200 Ohio Democrats by 11:59 PM to stay on track. Sign now: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/reich-abolish-filibuster-100922-1-2]

We’ve taken our foot off the gas this month to give our supporters a breather | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56449872/385008465/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjVlNTE5YS03MTg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fIr8rCQWFls8gFnn92Kf1gqbrGtmIugnJw_ADzdh3c=&emci=b7aaab2c-5785-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=bb5e519a-7185-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Running for Congress is a massive undertaking – one that’s a heck of a lot easier with a strong grassroots team behind you. Since launching our campaign last December, you all have shown me that I’m lucky enough to have just that. **That being said, here’s something that you should know:** Members of Congress are up for reelection every two years. Unfortunately, that means that campaigning never really stops. We’ve taken our foot off the gas this month to give our supporters a breather after the election and let folks spend time with family during the holidays. But with just 5 days left until the year-end deadline, I wanted you to know that we’re barely halfway to our $10,000 goal for the month. clean_body: We’ve taken our foot off the gas this month to give our supporters a breather | | Peter, Running for Congress is a massive undertaking – one that’s a heck of a lot easier with a strong grassroots team behind you. Since launching our campaign last December, you all have shown me that I’m lucky enough to have just that. That being said, here’s something that you should know: Members of Congress are up for reelection every two years. Unfortunately, that means that campaigning never really stops. We’ve taken our foot off the gas this month to give our supporters a breather after the election and let folks spend time with family during the holidays. But with just 5 days left until the year-end deadline, I wanted you to know that we’re barely halfway to our $10,000 goal for the month. = I know this team can help us make up the difference and get us to our goal. After all, we overcame the odds and WON this seat! name: Team Katie Porter
subject: The USPS of the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Last week, the US Postal Service announced their plan to buy more than 60,000 new electric vehicles in the next five years.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15586%2E3422442%2Eeu-DZt)
Derek, a few years from now, those holiday cards and gifts you send through the USPS could be delivered with an electric vehicle!
Last week, the US Postal Service announced their plan to buy**more than 60,000 new electric vehicles in the next five years**. This massive investment is in part made possible by the Inflation Reduction Act, which made substantial investments in our electric vehicle infrastructure.
These thousands of vehicles will produce zero emissions. But this large purchase **could also help bring down the cost of the electric vehicles for everyone,** making them more affordable and accessible.
Katie’s been proud to pass legislation this year to make this transition to electric vehicles a reality, and she’ll keep fighting to protect our environment.
—Team Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE26_EVM_20221226_V1_F&t=2&akid=15586%2E3422442%2Eeu-DZt)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15586%2E3422442%2Eeu-DZt)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15586%2E3422442%2Eeu-DZt).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
|
---
| | Real quick...

I have four bills on the shelf I'd _love_ your input on.

I hope you’re enjoying your holidays, folks. I know I’ve appreciated the opportunity to catch my breath and spend time with my family at home over the last few days. Over the past year, we have had an incredible round of wins for New Mexico — from the Early Childhood Constitutional Amendment to delivering hundreds of millions to fund critical community projects across our state. And thanks to you, our campaign was able to invest in battleground campaigns locally and nationally, including by growing our Senate majority and flipping New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue. Now, it’s time to prepare for the work ahead. A critical part of that is replenishing our campaign account. It’s important we start 2023 strong so we’re prepared to defend the Senate majority and the White House. **That’s why I’m reaching out today. clean_body: We need to replenish our campaign account to get ready for next year and beyond. I hope you’re enjoying your holidays, folks. I know I’ve appreciated the opportunity to catch my breath and spend time with my family at home over the last few days. Over the past year, we have had an incredible round of wins for New Mexico — from the Early Childhood Constitutional Amendment to delivering hundreds of millions to fund critical community projects across our state. And thanks to you, our campaign was able to invest in battleground campaigns locally and nationally, including by growing our Senate majority and flipping New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue. Now, it’s time to prepare for the work ahead. A critical part of that is replenishing our campaign account. It’s important we start 2023 strong so we’re prepared to defend the Senate majority and the White House. That’s why I’m reaching out today. Can you power our campaign by pitching in $10 or any amount you can before our end-of-quarter deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Our fundraising numbers will go public soon after the deadline — and we need to show Senate Republicans and Donald Trump’s allies that we’re ready to take on the challenges ahead. = Thank you. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Women facing a pregnancy they can’t afford are suffering right now in states where abortion care has been shut down. They may face outrageous travel and lodging costs, or, even worse, community surveillance and possible prosecution. They need your help now.

| | | | | Peter, This is the time of year, of course, when we naturally think of those less fortunate than us. With the freezing temperatures enveloping much of the country, we want to do anything we can to help those who are suffering. __After the cruel Dobbs decision by the Supreme Court, we're naturally thinking of pregnant women forced to become mothers, even though it sends their families into poverty. Or hiding from those reading their social media posts and spying on their behavior in anti-abortion police-states, all to turn them into Republican Big Brother running their local or state government in the hope of collecting some kind of sick bounty.__ _This is where the National Network of Abortion Funds (NNAF) steps in. They ensure that women, no matter their geography, gerrymandered state legislature, economic status or any other factors have access to their most basic right--control of their bodies. _ **_An unplanned pregnancy is often a significant factor in dire, intractable family poverty, and economic insecurity so severe that it causes children lifelong trauma. Giving women back control over their reproductive futures can help entire families, and in the end it helps all of us live in stronger, more stable communities._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55f8be86-439c-4356-8ee8-90aa1b0b88b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend,
Over the past two years, Joe Biden has invited millions of illegal aliens to infiltrate our Country in a gigantic unlawful invasion. _Now, after announcing on April 1, 2022, that he would end my Title 42 protections at the border and declining to appeal numerous court rulings_ , **Biden is getting what he always wanted: the termination of the most effective border security policy in modern history.**

Biden is willfully and deliberately triggering a cataclysm of illegal immigration like the world has never seen before.

Make no mistake, the border nightmare is happening for a single reason: because illegal aliens know that if they break into our Country unlawfully, Joe Biden will do everything possible to ensure that they are not removed and are allowed to stay here indefinitely. They may take your jobs and try to vote in OUR elections and Joe Biden doesn’t care.

Any form of amnesty now would be a historic disaster. **It would reward Joe Biden’s lawlessness** ,_it would reward the criminal cartels_ , it would reward child traffickers, and it would reward everyone who has broken the laws of our Nation.

**Every Republican must understand that any so-called “immigration reform” that gives Biden more resources will simply translate to even more releases.** _Biden inherited a flawless border policy and turned it into a mass-release machine._ The border can ONLY be secured by confronting Biden’s lawless and criminal misconduct—and stopping his illicit crusade to set loose millions of illegal aliens into the interior.

So, I am calling on Congress to take three crucial actions.

_**FIRST,**_ Congress must pass a TOTAL and PERMANENT BAN on Joe Biden or any other president using taxpayer dollars to release illegal aliens into our Country.

_**SECOND,**_ Congress needs to make permanent ALL of my administration’s groundbreaking border security reforms that allowed us to achieve the most secure border in history and to rapidly deport anyone who trespassed across our border.

_**THIRD,**_ Congress must establish _CRIMINAL PENALTIES_ for any senior official or political appointee who orders, aids, or abets the mass release of illegal aliens into the United States.

I know this is a lot of information, Friend, but I really need you to understand how critical this is. I need YOU to stop what you’re doing and sign my petition to DEMAND Joe Biden secure the Southern Border.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Our Revolution is the most impactful progressive organization in America, and we can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Thank you! Together we stood against the
power of big money in politics and rising Republican fascism to deliver
concrete results for working families in 2022.

Across America, in races up and down the ballot, Our Revolution members
made over 4.5 million voter contacts to offset the flood of corporate
propaganda and beat back a red wave.

Our grassroots organizing helped John Fetterman and Raphael Warnock win
their Senate contests and keep the Senate out of GOP hands. And in the
House, we elected nine new progressive champions to reinforce the ranks of
the Congressional Progressive Caucus and stand-up to corporate-backed
Democrats.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221226_1_1&t=1011&akid=3846%2E5885482%2EfJTxWX ]All of these successes were only possible because of contributions from
folks like you. Can we count on you to pitch in before our end-of-year
deadline to help us expand our work in 2023?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

This year, we also delivered significant wins on the state and local
levels. Our work in Minnesota helped Attorney General Keith Ellison fend
off a radical right-wing challenger bankrolled by police unions. And in
St. Louis, we beat back real estate developers to elect Meagan Green as
the new leader of a progressive-controlled city council.

While delivering huge electoral wins against long odds, we also took on
corporate Democrats to win key progressive policy fights. Our Revolution
faced-off against the fossil fuel industry to block Joe Manchin's dirty
deal three different times; we won big investments in clean energy and
forced Big Pharma to negotiate drug prices through the IRA; and we
fought-back against corporate union-busters to win the biggest funding
increase for the National Labor Relations Board in decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221226_1_1&t=1018&akid=3846%2E5885482%2EfJTxWX ]We proved, once again, that when we organize, we win — and these
victories are only possible with your support. Invest in Our Revolution
and help us secure more progressive victories in 2023 by chipping in now
before our end-of-year deadline!

In 2023, our work will expand along all of these fronts. We've already
launched a campaign to defeat sellouts like Kyrsten Sinema; we’re leading
the fight to ban insurrectionists from the ballot; we’re scaling up our on
the ground organizing to elect progressive mayors in cities like Chicago
and Philadelphia; and we’re ramping up the pressure on President Biden to
use the power of the pen to advance progressive policies.

The bottom line is this: Our Revolution is the most impactful
member-driven progressive organization in the country because we have
stayed relentlessly focused on changing the Democratic Party, electing
progressives, and making progressive policies a legislative reality.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221226_1_1&t=1019&akid=3846%2E5885482%2EfJTxWX ]Can we count on you to help us fund this critical work before our
end-of-year deadline?

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

| | **We are inching closer to our final end-of-month deadline of 2022, and we desperately need your help.** Here’s the truth: We need 11 Democrats from your area to step up if we want to reach our goal. Does this look right? | DEMOCRATIC SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: FIRST DECEMBER DONATION:PENDING SUGGESTED DONATION: $7 We know November 2023 and 2024 are the last thing on your mind right now, but here at the DLCC, we’re already laying the groundwork for the next year – making the investments in organizing, strategy, and messaging that will pay off down the line. $7 may not seem like much, but at this point in the year, every single dollar counts. Tillis and Sinema have agreed to a so-called “immigration reform” framework that would grant amnesty to **TWO MILLION** illegal aliens.**** Here at Heritage Action, we’re leading the fight in Washington to **_ensure_****this amnesty deal is derailed,** but it means nothing without thousands of conservative activists backing our fight. Your donation will be used for grassroots education and letter campaigns to members of Congress encouraging them to oppose this terrible amnesty deal. **[_Fellow Conservative, tell Congress NO AMNESTY by making a grassroots contribution now >>_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8d87eb6d4f&e=fdefed58de)**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. And, once again, Congress is ignoring the human suffering on the border to spend its time on a disastrousamnesty proposal that only adds fuel to the fire! | | | | Under the smoke screen of “bipartisanship,” Sens. Tillis and Sinema have agreed to a so-called “immigration reform” framework that would grant amnesty to TWO MILLION illegal aliens.** Here at Heritage Action, we’re leading the fight in Washington to ensure**this amnesty deal is derailed, but it means nothing without thousands of conservative activists backing our fight. Your donation will be used for grassroots education and letter campaigns to members of Congress encouraging them to oppose this terrible amnesty deal. | | | | Granting amnesty would be a virtual free pass to millions who have not been fully processed. Even worse, it would only encourage millions more to rush to the border and join other so-called asylum seekers. Fellow Conservative, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help us prevent this disastrous framework from becoming a reality. | | | | Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director Heritage Action for America | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. Peter, I hope you're as reenergized as me after the holidays. I wanted to officially invite you to our virtual rally this Wednesday with Congressman-Elect, Maxwell Alejandro Frost. We had some big surprises in the 2022 election cycle, but did you have the first Gen-Z candidate on your bingo card? How about the young vote saving some tight races across the nation? Future Generations did! You'll hear directly from Maxwell about his historic race, his message of love, and his immediate plans to affect change as the first Gen-Z member of Congress. You'll hear some BIG NEWS from our team on our plans for 2023! We took on some challenges and won big in Pennsylvania with John Fetterman and Summer Lee, Maxwell Frost in Florida, Jasmine Crockett and Greg Casar in Texas, Aisha Wahab in California, and Zo Qadri for Austin City Council! Future Generations never endorses without making a huge effort to elect our progressive candidates. As we continue to build the movement, we need the adequate funding for in-depth analyses of each race we endorse in, support for community outreach, and tools for our young organizers and candidates. _**[>> RSVP to join us this Wednesday (12/28) at 7:00pm ET. The Zoom link will be provided once you register. If you can't make it, consider donating to support our GOTV plans for 2023. <<](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ys5VnOAn5GJ6PPUUX-IF5xBIcoG6OuOmY5SMgHFT3Qi3iL0-qMlfFQ3cqB-A-MpslueS7dRp0aTCa1dPGLkzQ_9m-Z5Tn0HiHSPbH3YYFcD-H8Gze7y2o2dgbHhVoEFPWO70BQ3KmpXvM-beEzQ328smC7b2ujN1iVOZuASe7hcRoOWixB5XxflfQlND5nAyIBizMp2pmrHg8f9gUn945faRajir2Xhdm2wD8gxSgE5A1sGLXJYM15gtkUnXQPRGyHONDvS6qEEqKN1VbBc8VZr7cKnHZgMqqSEGOuiP_ZWN_mRq4gb7ewg2byO0WHHLqaWyeGzzlH3j4J1Pq2ob0H9QLflSUbOhhLcWfmcxy4eE-TLGNjwgZjmdIoWi1-hBo/3sb/4kU5Bj4ITM-D0Sy-hwzSFA/h4/MNpl8lxqnkO1s9AdsQgyxqnPJaz3-QHcXQK2BK7HpUw)**_

| | **Future Generations** is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations' philosophy of building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We support, recruit, train, and endorse candidates who are committed to securing a just society and livable planet. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats across Texas.

In 2022, we helped elect Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Greg Casar (TX-35), and Maxwell Frost (FL-10), the first Gen-Z member in Congress. | | [DONATE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOv7mxcZwCQc5gjX28pZHbUw_7fKiMhyFU5zVkvr62bxttNGLxBKjaxJ1514Ca8IA0p3Lr_ADS08C4nGXYLqSgX1YxbQHTFoElO4_wbdzkOncLYPfuwDcdzMdvy9-cdX4khhx7eIJwlwilODg0Gc3EeFkpgE5Lu2BpdNc9IEA-fn03sdoEha_EnmzfrpxVBtGSgm4z9-wyPNo2aFqTsCLVhNWkVQKvsEcU8UTFvm7fukMAw-P1CxJqhq1sK2l_gsbz1N8MM6Eyv_XXutDYKw6u_1cvJNaPRmylhWXmHcp2J49Ah2xYNpWL8JMJuwDpmA5Lwt2w_QFjHS6PnsdfJulswj65QSVGkrmyfiiS5nm1AUFgaK19iePFLGRKwEOuhNWFqzDRLoWvPhK0OTSeQA0Atg/3sb/4kU5Bj4ITM-D0Sy-hwzSFA/h5/hBEZsVlF26IFUBUzrXlvgWu25_nbMBwlgvlkBLg18t8)

clean_body: Learn about Maxwell's legislative plans in Congress and how to organize at home! | | Peter, I hope you're as reenergized as me after the holidays. I wanted to officially invite you to our virtual rally this Wednesday with Congressman-Elect, Maxwell Alejandro Frost. We will be discussing our plans for 2023 and sharing some exciting news! | | We had some big surprises in the 2022 election cycle, but did you have the first Gen-Z candidate on your bingo card? How about the young vote saving some tight races across the nation? Future Generations did! You'll hear directly from Maxwell about his historic race, his message of love, and his immediate plans to affect change as the first Gen-Z member of Congress. You'll hear some BIG NEWS from our team on our plans for 2023! We took on some challenges and won big in Pennsylvania with John Fetterman and Summer Lee, Maxwell Frost in Florida, Jasmine Crockett and Greg Casar in Texas, Aisha Wahab in California, and Zo Qadri for Austin City Council! Future Generations never endorses without making a huge effort to elect our progressive candidates. As we continue to build the movement, we need the adequate funding for in-depth analyses of each race we endorse in, support for community outreach, and tools for our young organizers and candidates. In solidarity, Roza Calderon Executive Director, Future Generations | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations' philosophy of building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We support, recruit, train, and endorse candidates who are committed to securing a just society and livable planet. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats across Texas. In 2022, we helped elect Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Greg Casar (TX-35), and Maxwell Frost (FL-10), the first Gen-Z member in Congress. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Paid for by Future Generations PAC. ---|--- Future Generations PAC P.O. If we fall even one dollar short, we’ll have to stop our critical work to defend our Senate majority in 2024. For good. But if 430 top PA Democrats (like you!) step up and = we’ll have the tools to launch Democratic heroes to victory in 2023, 2024, and beyond! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We need to keep on organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Because of groups like WFP and activists like you, grassroots progressive candidates were able to defy the odds this year. | | | Hello, Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren. In a few moments, **[I’m going to ask if you can make an end-of-year contribution to the Working Families Party — because it would make a real difference to help hit their final goal of 2022 and fuel our shared fight in 2023.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8F8dymU0NsehlJVXuZiNFMSwIAp7miPoI3wRJL26aF-qkZfN9iTLnjVYv6nOiUOA7khwg3tZOtPHLghusjbm7cJ9-6vhk6Anu7M06yYS025osYBjKg1KlraeBH-vIC83U7mSY195fuggemqdhgVwehIY-CFb6ZXPiZ0bjq_E6R-FSw-gNGppD1Bv936FnB16QHlQeECvb3qM8BlbenE_HQPjbanyeZTy--3UPIdkUw9r-C-UTsjVo9CAx3hONb5XkKCuqiuAJOvSDmbELNP-pbAqjJqvz3fv_Wu51ogwpfx9R7-2RU8HoiPb6z1xizhQ7LhoKHU8OLIVKWsFPAqJ3A/3sb/wjgEDQOkRyG0LKMQFf_pFQ/h0/U_NRl87Q8S16ljzbtdA2faMduA2twlPgIyEc12AbVa4) But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk about why grassroots donations are so important in our shared fight to keep delivering victories for working families.** According to almost all the pundits, 2022 was supposed to be a year of gloom and doom for Democrats. But then Americans got a chance to weigh in at the ballot box. And the message they sent was unmistakable. Voters rejected that media narrative and fought back against extremist Republican attacks on abortion and democracy across the country. People-powered progressives defied the odds — winning local elections, city council seats, and school board seats. Democrats won key governors’ races, elected more unapologetic progressives to the House, and _expanded_ our majority in the Senate. And we did it all in the face of a record amount of big money spending. The Working Families Party was on the frontlines of this fight. And every grassroots contribution a supporter donated, every phone call a volunteer made, and every conversation shared with a voter ended up making a real difference — especially in razor-thin races. **Because of these efforts, so many progressive candidates endorsed by the Working Families Party were able to overcome powerful special interests and win their elections this year.** That includes new members who I’ll be very glad to welcome to Congress in January, from John Fetterman in the Senate to House Representatives like Summer Lee, Greg Casar, Delia Ramirez, Maxwell Frost, Becca Balint, and Jasmine Crockett. I'm also very happy that Rev. Raphael Warnock will stay in the Senate after winning his runoff earlier this month. We’re going to need to continue this critical work over the next two years, because Republican extremists will try to hit working families with a wrecking ball from the House. **We didn’t back down when pundits predicted 2022 was going to be a massive “red wave.” And we aren’t about to give in to extremists in 2023.** Instead, we need to keep on organizing: to resist Republican attacks, to advance our progressive agenda, and to elect even more unapologetic fighters for working families in the next election cycle. That’s what the Working Families Party will be fighting for in 2023 and beyond, and it’s why I’m asking you: **** **[If you’re able to, can you make an end-of-year contribution to the Working Families Party today? Your support is critical to their year-round efforts to train, elect (and re-elect!) more champions for working people at every level of government.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8F8dymU0NsehlJVXuZiNFMSwIAp7miPoI3wRJL26aF-qkZfN9iTLnjVYv6nOiUOAfjI3tr6_dZAx5WlTtqnUofOKLIqcbRTAcdsOTt8SAzTcx5RlMBOwlT4FY6BiubwyMI4Xk0Mbx4DI5YvHCEhE3trnGtPjuYMWS93exxrDsv5uL0sPPcoMOc3z85MobF8acXvc7guZIWF9wIkRZPr7ovmfEHYfsXT_MKJQlAVZIs760sZ4ObcY8nZCuVkGCUC-bQtqGwhHRoSU66qFWavsNGp_NKXoGjjqzrWYRNfbLVCs84G4qaqY7zUA4901xvajQuoI4Ng8SoxFwPQI_-jMwg/3sb/wjgEDQOkRyG0LKMQFf_pFQ/h1/9GpYz405gVe6aJRE6htNdCdYOXgYQWRVdtSsmbZWrdM)** **[Donate $4 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8F8dymU0NsehlJVXuZiNFMSwIAp7miPoI3wRJL26aF8CFINbn-gJZDPe8AJSesBdgnYVHntLxPsnS8kESi_s69fqLH49eiF6uvkq_rNfbwO1Kb9NmRHPbPnMsoYFM1sD_4HbQW_wN3D206ZOnd_e1mr_KvAhU7bRjtukThplhJCs8WAr0DjrSevokLD7LSwGGxFhuiQFyyakFyG3avUHFEWwWPiwlYaSXoWvPtpV-Fd3yi0kFWJ2rbOZ6dorTsfnrXcpFDdhN1JxLsawTVWgqC30IO6dotSL_wLMRCikLGdR3WOihBgHXO0yH3KPowvckjka_Mz8Zwq543tz4elWIw/3sb/wjgEDQOkRyG0LKMQFf_pFQ/h2/R5chenP5PmQnIMDISQBLfg7Q-_b7usc9H_AiMzxLmdQ)** The 2022 midterms showed us how to defeat Republican extremists. Instead of capitulating to them, we need to keep on fighting for working families — because when we come together to fight for working people, we win. Thanks for being a part of this, and wishing you and yours a safe and happy holiday season, Elizabeth

clean_body: Because of groups like WFP and activists like you, grassroots progressive candidates were able to defy the odds this year. | | | Hello, Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren. In a few moments, But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk about why grassroots donations are so important in our shared fight to keep delivering victories for working families. According to almost all the pundits, 2022 was supposed to be a year of gloom and doom for Democrats. But then Americans got a chance to weigh in at the ballot box. And the message they sent was unmistakable. Voters rejected that media narrative and fought back against extremist Republican attacks on abortion and democracy across the country. People-powered progressives defied the odds — winning local elections, city council seats, and school board seats. Democrats won key governors’ races, elected more unapologetic progressives to the House, and expanded our majority in the Senate. And we did it all in the face of a record amount of big money spending. The Working Families Party was on the frontlines of this fight. And every grassroots contribution a supporter donated, every phone call a volunteer made, and every conversation shared with a voter ended up making a real difference — especially in razor-thin races. Because of these efforts, so many progressive candidates endorsed by the Working Families Party were able to overcome powerful special interests and win their elections this year. That includes new members who I’ll be very glad to welcome to Congress in January, from John Fetterman in the Senate to House Representatives like Summer Lee, Greg Casar, Delia Ramirez, Maxwell Frost, Becca Balint, and Jasmine Crockett. I'm also very happy that Rev. Raphael Warnock will stay in the Senate after winning his runoff earlier this month. We’re going to need to continue this critical work over the next two years, because Republican extremists will try to hit working families with a wrecking ball from the House. We didn’t back down when pundits predicted 2022 was going to be a massive “red wave.” And we aren’t about to give in to extremists in 2023. Instead, we need to keep on organizing: to resist Republican attacks, to advance our progressive agenda, and to elect even more unapologetic fighters for working families in the next election cycle. That’s what the Working Families Party will be fighting for in 2023 and beyond, and it’s why I’m asking you: ** The 2022 midterms showed us how to defeat Republican extremists. Instead of capitulating to them, we need to keep on fighting for working families — because when we come together to fight for working people, we win. Thanks for being a part of this, and wishing you and yours a safe and happy holiday season, Elizabeth Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=066dd6805b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next weeks.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b387669e02&e=fdefed58de)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2f5dbef549&e=fdefed58de)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f4ebec382f&e=fdefed58de)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=57022043a7&e=fdefed58de)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift>>](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2441b3c61e&e=fdefed58de)**
| | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0251c95f4a&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=aa5dcf79bf&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $80](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d5cfa4351b&e=fdefed58de)
---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b9b5e08bae&e=fdefed58de)
---
|
